symbols: cattle — God's provision and the wealth of pastoral life, echoing the herds of the patriarchs
dramatic sky — the majesty and power of the Creator over all nature
herdsmen — human dominion and stewardship over creation as mandated in Genesis
description: A vast twilight landscape dominated by a herd of cattle spread across an open parkland. In the foreground a large white bull stands prominently, while brown and dappled cattle graze and rest behind it. To the left, herdsmen gather near a wooden fence beneath dark clustered trees. The sky is heavy with dark clouds broken by a band of brilliant golden light at the horizon, casting the animals in dramatic silhouette and warm glow.
